title: Aziz Hashim Identity

title: Nicholas II Assassination
description: Who was responsible for the death of Tsar Nicholas II of Russia?
narrative: The user seeks factual information identifying the individual(s) or group that carried out the execution of Tsar Nicholas II and his family in July 1918. Relevant documents should describe the perpetrators (e.g., the Bolshevik secret police, the execution squad led by Yakov Yurovsky), the circumstances of the killings, and any historically accepted evidence or sources confirming responsibility. Materials focusing only on the broader Russian Revolution without naming the executors are not sufficient.

title: Monk Theme Singer

narrative: The user wants to know the name of the artist who sang or performed the main theme of the show Monk; relevant documents should mention the vocalist/composer associated with the show's opening or closing theme (e.g., Randy Newman, Jeff Beal) and provide clear attribution.

title: Shotgun Patterning
description: Why do hunters pattern their shotguns?
narrative: The user seeks an explanation of the purpose and benefits of patterning shotguns for hunting, including how it affects pellet distribution, accuracy, and overall hunting effectiveness. Relevant materials should describe the practice of patterning, its reasons (e.g., ensuring appropriate spread at target distances), and any related guidelines or outcomes for hunters.

title: Pete Rose Ban

title: Geon Definition
description: What does the term “geon” mean?
narrative: The user is looking for an authoritative definition or description of the word “geon,” including its usage in scientific contexts (e.g., geology, physics, or geography). Relevant documents should provide a clear definition, etymology, and brief explanation of the concept.

title: Pareto Chart Definition
description: What is a Pareto chart and how is it used in statistics?
narrative: The user wants a clear and concise definition of a Pareto chart, including its purpose, key components (bars and cumulative line), interpretation guidelines, and typical applications in statistical quality control and data analysis. Relevant documents should explain the concept, provide examples, and differentiate it from other histogram or bar chart types.

title: Clothes Whitening

Sources that only list types of energy without addressing propagation media, or that focus on unrelated topics, are not relevant.

title: UN FAO definition

title: Granulation Tissue Initiation

Sources may include peer‑reviewed articles, textbook chapters, clinical wound‑healing guides, and reputable medical websites. Documents that merely mention granulation tissue without explaining its initiation, or that focus on wound classification or unrelated wound types, are not relevant.
